form.formComment: Two-year-old colt making debut by Nicconi out of I'm Gunna Cashew. Dam was a winner of two races. Purchased for AUD $190,000 (Magic Millions 2025 Gold Coast National Yearling Sale). Was second in a Beaudesert trial over 900m March 19. Pay to keep an eye on the betting despite a difficult draw.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Two-year-old colt making debut by Nicconi out of I'm Gunna Cashew. Dam was a winner of two races. Purchased for AUD $190,000 (Magic Millions 2025 Gold Coast National Yearling Sale). Was second in a Beaudesert trial over 900m March 19. Pay to keep an eye on the betting despite a difficult draw.

form.formComment: First starter by Lucky Vega out of Pattle Reef. Half-brother to winner Pacific Luck. AUD $30,000 (Magic Millions 2025 Gold Coast Yearling Sale) purchase. Trialled on March 24 when second at Warwick over 800m. Market watch advised.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter by Lucky Vega out of Pattle Reef. Half-brother to winner Pacific Luck. AUD $30,000 (Magic Millions 2025 Gold Coast Yearling Sale) purchase. Trialled on March 24 when second at Warwick over 800m. Market watch advised.

form.formComment: Filly by Jonker facing the starter for the first time. Dam was a winner of five races and Listed performed. Was runner-up in a trial at Sunshine Coast Inner Track on March 31 over 850m. Market watch advised.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by Jonker facing the starter for the first time. Dam was a winner of five races and Listed performed. Was runner-up in a trial at Sunshine Coast Inner Track on March 31 over 850m. Market watch advised.

form.formComment: At debut, 2nd of 7 at this track 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 800m, 0.9 len behind Lonesome Star with 56kg at $10. Better for that outing and looks a great chance to break through.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). At debut, 2nd of 7 at this track 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 800m, 0.9 len behind Lonesome Star with 56kg at $10. Better for that outing and looks a great chance to break through.

form.formComment: First starter by Power out of Jardin Rouge. Full-sister to two-start maiden Jardin De Lys. Dam was a winner of seven races. Third March 17 at Doomben at her only trial. Can make an immediate impact.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter by Power out of Jardin Rouge. Full-sister to two-start maiden Jardin De Lys. Dam was a winner of seven races. Third March 17 at Doomben at her only trial. Can make an immediate impact.

form.formComment: First starter by Time To Reign out of Havelka. Full-sister to one-start maiden On Me. Dam was a winner of one race. Trialled on March 27 when second at Gold Coast over 850m. Cannot be underestimated.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter by Time To Reign out of Havelka. Full-sister to one-start maiden On Me. Dam was a winner of one race. Trialled on March 27 when second at Gold Coast over 850m. Cannot be underestimated.

form.formComment: Resuming after a three-and-a-half month break. Finished off last preparation fifth of 10 at Sunshine Coast 2yo Mdn-Sw December 26 over 1000m, soft track; 2.5 len behind Vanzadee carrying 56kg at $12. On debut third of 8 at Rockhampton 2yo Mdn-Sw November 14 over 1050m, soft track; 2.5 len behind Erimar with 55kg at $51. Open to improvement and expected to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Resuming after a three-and-a-half month break. Finished off last preparation fifth of 10 at Sunshine Coast 2yo Mdn-Sw December 26 over 1000m, soft track; 2.5 len behind Vanzadee carrying 56kg at $12. On debut third of 8 at Rockhampton 2yo Mdn-Sw November 14 over 1050m, soft track; 2.5 len behind Erimar with 55kg at $51. Open to improvement and expected to feature.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start sat behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 8 at Eagle Farm 2yo SWP on October 11 over 1000m, 10 len behind Lady Of Five with 54.5kg at $151. Went for a break before returning 5th of 7 at this track 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 800m, 5 len behind Lonesome Star carrying 56kg at $18. Looking elsewhere for the winner.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Second-up. form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last campaign second last of 7 at Doomben 2yo Hcp November 15 over 1200m, soft track; 11 len behind Zip Lock carrying 56.5kg at $61. On debut second last of 7 at Doomben 2yo SWP October 25 over 1050m, 6 len behind Remembrall carrying 54.5kg at $51. Can't enthuse.
